name: Monster Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup + 2 tablespoons firmly packed brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter; gradually add sugar, beating well.
2. Add eggs, peanut butter, vanilla, and corn syrup; beat well.
3. Add oats, baking soda, and salt, stirring well.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients.
5. Drop dough by one-fourth cupfuls, four inches apart, onto lightly greased cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 12-15 minutes (centers of cookies will be slightly soft).
7. Cool slightly on cookie sheets; remove to wire racks and cool completely.
